title: ‘Threat to long‐term employment patterns’: EY report reveals how AI can reshape India’s IT-services job market
description: EY said the fast evolution of generative AI and automation tools is expected to reshape employment patterns globally and will have particular implications for India, whose services exports are dominated by information technology and business process management sectors.
